title: Write ferrum_extlib_input.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_input: input event normalization across Wayland, evdev, X11, Win32. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: unified input event type with float widget-space coordinates, pointer events, keyboard events with keycode translation, touch events, text input via IME (zwp-text-input-v3 on Wayland), evdev direct access for windowless apps, clipboard and drag-and-drop.
